description: His Excellency Helal Saeed Al Marri discusses the importance of blockchain and innovation at Binance Blockchain Week in Dubai, emphasizing the need for a progressive global response to the digital economy.
topic_summary: Keynote address by His Excellency Helal Saeed Al Marri at Binance Blockchain Week, highlighting Dubai's role in the future of blockchain and the digital economy [t=0:16].
